title: LittlePictureFrames - Creative Frame Recipe
description: Adds an easy recipe for the Creative Frame from LittlePictureFrames
body: A small minecraft 1.21 - 1.21.1 datapack that adds a simple shaped crafting recipe of the Creative Picture Frame from LittlePictureFrames, because you can't get it in survival mode. Only needs 8 wooden planks of any type, even modded ones + a single glowstone dust in the middle. Check the gallery if you need guidance on how to craft and have fun!
